name: Blue Dragon (Hyper Muscle)
description:
Blue Dragon.. All big and muscle bounded. He does not have much connection to the series except for his personality and special attacks. Are you a kindred spirit of pushing limits? Or are you just going to admire him?

The artwork sketch coloring is by Kurogon on e621 and is up-scaled. You can see his art on bsky as he posts there mostly. If the artist wants me to remove his artwork from this bot. I won't hesitate to remove it.
creator: SpecialD64
